name: R-1 (SS-78)
events: This page was last updated in August 2016.
1 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
Not much is currently known to us about the exploits of USS R-1 before April 1942. She had arrived at Bermuda around mid December 1941.
2 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
3 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
6 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with aircraft.
7 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
9 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
10 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
11 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) departed Bermuda for a war patrol.
For the daily and attack positions of USS R-1 during this patrol see the map below.
16 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) attacked the German submarine U-582, north-north-east of Bermuda in position 36°50'N, 60°52'W.
(All times are zone 3) 0920 hours - Sighted a German U-boat of the 740 ton type bearing 214°, range 500 yards. Enemy course 310°. Started attack.
0928 hours - Fired three torpedoes from 1400 yards. It is thought that one hit had been obtained but this was not the case. (1)
23 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) returned to Bermuda.
30 Apr 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
1 May 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) conducted exercises off Bermuda.
5 May 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) departed Bermuda for a war patrol.
For the daily positions of USS R-1 during this patrol see the map below.
17 May 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. J.D.L. Grant, USN) returned to Bermuda.
31 May 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) departed Bermuda for a war patrol.
11 Jun 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) returned to Bermuda.

8 Jul 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut via patrol station 300 nautical miles north of Bermuda.
8 Jul 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) departed Bermuda for a war patrol.
20 Jul 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) ended her war patrol at New London, Connecticut. At New London she underwent an overhaul.
7 Aug 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) was docked at New London.
19 Aug 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) was undocked.
11 Sep 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) was put on the slipway at New London.
13 Sep 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) was put back in the water.
22 Sep 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda via patrol station 300 nautical miles north of Bermuda.
30 Sep 1942 USS R-1 (Lt. W.R. Laughon, USN) arrived at Bermuda from patrol.
2 Oct 1942 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Laughon, USN) departed Bermuda to ride out an approaching hurricane at sea.

No further war diaries of the submarine base at Bermuda are available (for the moment) so the further exploits of USS R-1 at Bermuda are currently unknown to us.
18 Dec 1944 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut.
22 Dec 1944 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
28 Feb 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Port Everglades, Florida.
7 Mar 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) arrived at Port Everglades, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
31 Mar 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) departed Port Everglades, Florida for New London, Connecticut.
5 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut from Port Everglades, Florida.
14 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
15 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) arrived at Casco Bay, Maine. She had been escorted from the Cape Cod Canal by USS Eisner (Lt.Cdr. D.H. Lay, USNR). They had made rendez-vous at 1536/14.

16 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Straub (Lt.Cdr. J.E. Coie, Jr., USNR), USS Micka (Lt.Cdr. R.T. Reid, USNR), USS Gustafson (Lt.Cdr. A.E. Chambers, USNR) and USS Trumpeter (Lt.Cdr. G.B. Buck, Jr., USNR).

18 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Straub (Lt.Cdr. J.E. Coie, Jr., USNR), USS Micka (Lt.Cdr. R.T. Reid, USNR), USS Gustafson (Lt.Cdr. A.E. Chambers, USNR) and USS Trumpeter (Lt.Cdr. G.B. Buck, Jr., USNR).

19 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Woolsey (Lt.Cdr. W.M. Shifflette, USN), USS Eberle (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Transue, USN) and USS Cates (Lt.Cdr. T.N. Broaddus, USNR).

20 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Selfridge (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Boyd, USN), USS Knoxville (Lt.Cdr. G.R. Reynolds, USCGR) and USS Brunswick (Lt.Cdr. B.B. Sherry, USCGR).
22 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Uniontown (Lt. R.K. Safford, USCGR) and USS Muskegon (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Home, USCGR).
28 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Spry (Lt. H.R. Snavely, USNR) and USCGC Comanche (Lt. J.W. Hume, USCGR).

30 Apr 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Roy O. Hale (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Pogue, Jr., USNR) and USS Martin H. Ray (Lt.Cdr. H.V. Tucker, Jr., USNR).
1 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Clark (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Hopkins, USNR) and USS Phelps (Lt.Cdr. R.B. Erly, USN).
2 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt. W.A. Schoenfeld, USN) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Brough (Lt. M.A. Stein, USNR) and USS Blair (Lt. W. Gadsby, Jr., USNR).
21 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Saucy (Lt. B.H. Farwell, USNR) and USS Courage (Lt. C.G. Helm Jr., USNR).
22 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Bainbridge (Lt.Cdr. W.S. Hitchins, USNR).
24 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Tenacity (Lt. B.D. Barker Jr., USNR) and USCGC Laurel (Lt. C. Howard, USCG(R)).
26 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Hingham (Lt.Cdr. W.K. Earle, USCGR).

27 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Gladwyne (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Miller, USCG) and USS Racine (Lt.Cdr. C.H. Waring, Jr., USCGR).

28 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Hingham (Lt.Cdr. W.K. Earle, USCGR), USS Gladwyne (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Miller, USCG) and USS Racine (Lt.Cdr. C.H. Waring, Jr., USCGR).
29 May 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with Tenacity and Laurel.

5 Jun 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) conducted A/S exercises off Casco Bay, Maine together with USS Gladwyne (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Miller, USCG) and USS Racine (Lt.Cdr. C.H. Waring, Jr., USCGR).

28 Jun 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut. She was escorted by USS Racine (Lt.Cdr. C.H. Waring, Jr., USCGR) to the east entrance to the Cape Cod Canal.
29 Jun 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
7 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
13 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) arrived at Key West, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
17 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) is put on the slipway at Key West.
20 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) is put back in the water.
23 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
24 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
25 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
26 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
30 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
31 Jul 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) participated in exercises off Key West.
20 Sep 1945 USS R-1 (Lt.Cdr. J.H. Cunningham, Jr., USNR) was decommissioned at Key West, Florida.
